freedom.title: FreeDOM Software
freedom.subtitle: The absolute intelligence behind your building. A comprehensive, beautifully designed software suite for programming, supervising, and managing your entire automation infrastructure.
freedom.whatTitle: Built for the People Who Install It
freedom.whatBody: FreeDOM is the configuration software our installers use to bring every module to life. It's an interactive, multilingual tool built around simple pop-up menus: scan your building's floor plans, name every zone, then connect any input — switches, detectors, sensors — to any output, from lights to blinds to radiator valves. Part of the logic is then uploaded directly into the microprocessor-based modules, so your building keeps running exactly as programmed, even with the PC switched off.
freedom.supervisionBody: Nestor's live device tree keeps every meter, sensor and system in view — the same real-time engine behind FreeDOM's supervision and financial monitoring.
freedom.featuresSubtitle: FreeDOM provides an unparalleled suite of tools designed specifically for facility managers and system integrators.
freedom.feat1Desc: Scan your building's plans, name every zone, and connect any input to any output — lights, blinds, radiator valves — through simple pop-up menus.
freedom.feat2Desc: Monitor the exact state of your building's systems in real-time with zero latency.
freedom.feat3Desc: Track costs, catch anomalies, and split expenses fairly across tenants — down to prepaid billing.
freedom.feat4Desc: Fine-tune dimming and setpoints, or let FreeDOM learn your building's 10-day temperature history to time every heating and cooling cycle automatically.
freedom.feat5Desc: Seamless integration with fire, intrusion and panic-button systems — including automatic calls to emergency services.
freedom.feat6Desc: Control and monitor your entire building from anywhere, or let FreeDOM simulate occupancy — lights, doors, even the TV — while you're away.
freedom.desktopSubtitle: A drag-and-drop SCADA view of your building, compatible with Nestor, Hikvision, SVTech and Fireclass devices out of the box.
freedom.desktopFeature1: 8 categories, one panel — scenes, lighting, blinds, sensors, access, climate, sockets and cameras
freedom.desktopFeature2: Drag-and-drop plan view — every device placed exactly where it sits in your building
freedom.desktopFeature3: Full history and graphs for temperature, consumption and every other tracked value
freedom.desktopFeature4: Real-time control via our NESTOR protocol — lights, dimmers, thermostats, doors and sockets respond instantly
freedom.wiringSubtitle: Real panel wiring from BAT installations — see exactly how our modules connect together.
freedom.munnBody: Our in-house companion app for smart buildings — one place to control every system in your home or office.
freedom.uncompromisedDesc: Achieve the perfect environment effortlessly. Our systems continuously monitor and adjust temperature, lighting, and ventilation tailored perfectly to your daily operational needs.
about.title: Pioneering Building Automation
about.subtitle: The intelligence behind smarter, safer buildings.
about.storyBody: BAT — Building Automation Transmission (Btg SA) specialises in intelligent building automation. We design and manufacture a complete range of modules that obtain data and control any type of device, uniting all the technologies of a building into one coherent system.
about.missionBody: Our mission is to bring all the isolated technologies of a building together into a single, highly cohesive ecosystem. We don't just automate; we intelligently orchestrate.
about.missionDetails: By developing our own proprietary hardware modules paired with the robust FreeDOM software suite, we offer an unprecedented level of integration, reliability, and flexibility tailored to the exacting demands of modern architecture.
about.adv1Body: A highly robust proprietary communication protocol ensuring flawless, zero-latency data transmission across hundreds of modules.
about.adv2Body: The ultimate supervisor tool. Monitor, configure, and override the entire ecosystem from any device, anywhere in the world.
about.industriesBody: Our highly adaptable systems scale effortlessly, providing tailored automation solutions across a diverse range of critical sectors.
about.busBody: Every module communicates over the robust BAT BUS — a single, scalable wiring backbone that links power, acquisition, control and communication modules. Add or repeat the bus to extend supervision across an entire site.

legal.privacyIntro: BAT (Btg SA) ("BAT", "we", "us") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect through this website, how we use it, and the choices and rights you have.
legal.privacyS1Body: This website is operated by Btg SA, trading as BAT — Building Automation Transmission, with registered offices at Esplanade Street 50L, 9227 Diekirch, Luxembourg. For any privacy-related question, contact us at info@bat-sa.com.
legal.privacyS2Body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, company, email address, phone number and message when you submit our contact form or request a demo. We also collect limited technical data automatically — such as browser type, device type, and general usage patterns — to help us operate and improve this website.
legal.privacyS3Body: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, provide quotes and product information, schedule demonstrations, operate and improve our website, and comply with our legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
legal.privacyS4Body: This website uses a minimal set of cookies necessary for core functionality, such as remembering your selected language. We do not use third-party advertising or tracking cookies. You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings at any time.
legal.privacyS5Body: We use trusted third-party providers to deliver parts of this website, including hosting infrastructure and interactive 3D content (Spline). These providers may process limited technical data solely to deliver their service to us and do not use it for their own marketing purposes.
legal.privacyS6Body: We retain personal data collected through this website only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by applicable law, after which it is securely deleted or anonymized.
legal.privacyS7Body: If you are located in the European Economic Area, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the use of your personal data, to object to its processing, and to request data portability. You may also lodge a complaint with the Luxembourg National Commission for Data Protection (CNPD). To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@bat-sa.com.
legal.privacyS8Body: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect the personal data we hold against unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.
legal.privacyS9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
legal.termsIntro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of this website, operated by Btg SA, trading as BAT — Building Automation Transmission. By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
legal.termsS1Body: You may browse this website and use its contact and inquiry features for legitimate business purposes related to our products and services. You agree not to misuse this website, including by attempting unauthorized access, scraping content at scale, or interfering with its normal operation.
legal.termsS2Body: All content on this website — including text, product images, diagrams, logos, and the FreeDOM and Munn software interfaces shown — is the property of Btg SA or its licensors and is protected by copyright and trademark law. No content may be reproduced or reused without our prior written consent.
legal.termsS3Body: Product descriptions, specifications, images, and pricing indications on this website are provided for informational purposes and may change without notice. Please contact us to confirm current specifications and availability before making a purchasing decision.
legal.termsS4Body: This website may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by us. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or terms of any third-party site.
legal.termsS5Body: This website and its content are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Btg SA shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website.
legal.termsS6Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Luxembourg, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Any dispute arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Luxembourg.
legal.termsS7Body: We may revise these Terms at any time by updating this page. Continued use of this website after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.
legal.termsS8Body: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at info@bat-sa.com.
